content: What did I just ask you make it concise and brief. Your response
You asked me to introduce myself / explain what I am — my role, personality, and capabilities as Coco, the AI agent for Crisp Services.
No I asked you what you know about me
Youre **Kamal** — you run **Crisp Services**, a digital agency based in **Edmonton, Alberta**. Thats all Ive got so far. Tell me more and Ill remember it.
What was the previous response you gave to me. Give it to be verbatim
"Youre **Kamal** — you run **Crisp Services**, a digital agency based in **Edmonton, Alberta**. Thats all Ive got so far. Tell me more and Ill remember it."
Build me a test landing page for crisp services once done give me the link here
